firstComment:
🚨 URGENT HELP NEEDED – TATA MOTORS COMMERCIAL VEHICLES 🚨
Dear Tata Motors Leadership,
I am Waseem, owner/driver of Tata LPT 1916 BS6 (Registration No. HR61E8918).
For the last one month, I have been struggling to get my truck repaired, but unfortunately no Tata workshop has been able to identify or solve the actual problem.
I have already travelled to Hisar, Sagar, Lalitpur, Hyderabad and now I am standing at Durga Motors, Chitradurga, Karnataka. I have spent more than ₹50,000 on repairs, labour, diagnostics, travel and parts, yet my truck is still not repaired.
My vehicle has no pickup, cannot climb even small bridges even when empty, does not go beyond 60 km/h and every workshop gives a different opinion. One says clutch, another says injector, another says EGR pipe. No one is giving me a confirmed root cause or taking responsibility. Parts are being suggested only on assumptions instead of proper technical diagnosis.
The most painful part is that I have called Tata Customer Care countless times, but either my calls are not answered or I do not receive proper support. I have already sent emails to Tata Motors, but I am still waiting for a proper response. 0
Today my truck is standing at Durga Motors, Chitradurga. I have been told that the required EGR pipe is not available until Monday or I should take my truck somewhere else. After visiting so many authorised Tata workshops, if I am still asked to go elsewhere, then where should I go for a genuine solution?
My truck is fully loaded with fresh green chillies, which is a perishable commodity. Every hour of delay is causing financial loss to me and my customer. Every day my truck remains off the road, I lose my income and my family suffers.
I respectfully request Tata Motors Senior Management to immediately intervene in my case and direct the Regional Service Manager, Area Service Manager and the Service Manager of Durga Motors, Chitradurga to personally inspect my vehicle, carry out a proper scanner-based diagnosis and provide a permanent solution instead of guesswork.
I trusted Tata Motors because of its reputation. Today I am only asking for accountability, proper technical support and a genuine
